name: structure

parameters.name: save <name: string> <from: x y z> <to: x y z> [saveMode: disk|memory] [includesEntities: Boolean] [includesBlocks: Boolean]
parameters.description: 将指定坐标区域保存为结构。saveMode: disk=保存到文件，memory=保存到内存（临时）

parameters.name: load <name: string> <to: x y z> [rotation: 0_degrees|90_degrees|180_degrees|270_degrees] [mirror: none|x|z|xz] [animationMode: block_by_block|layer_by_layer] [animationSeconds: float] [includesEntities: Boolean] [includesBlocks: Boolean] [waterlogged: Boolean] [integrity: float] [seed: string]
parameters.description: 在指定位置加载结构。支持旋转、镜像、动画加载模式和完整度控制

examples.description: 将坐标区域内的结构保存为myhouse到磁盘
在指定位置加载myhouse结构并旋转90度

bedrock_specific_notes: structure命令是基岩版特有的，Java版使用结构方块实现类似功能。保存到disk的结构文件为.mcstructure格式，存放在世界文件夹的structures目录中。支持动画加载模式(block_by_block和layer_by_layer)。
